_meta.purpose: Engagement tiers on the homepage (// SYS.07 > ENGAGEMENT).
_meta.basis: Standard senior full-stack / AI freelance rates, remote, USD. `rate` is the hourly anchor the tiers derive from. Adjust currency and figures to your market.

rate.note: Standard senior remote rate. Sprints and project builds are quoted as fixed scope; the hourly is the anchor.

tiers.name: Fixed-scope sprint
tiers.description: A defined feature or fix, scoped and shipped in 1–2 weeks. Best for one clear thing.

tiers.name: Project build
tiers.description: Idea to launched product over 4–10 weeks. Full-stack, AI, and tooling, end to end.

tiers.name: Ongoing retainer
tiers.description: Senior capacity on tap. A set block of time each month for whatever moves the metric.
